title: Strolid Leadership Call
summary: The Strolid Leadership call focused on rescheduling the meeting due to Vinnie's absence, preparing a presentation for Lithia detailing Q1 2026 and Q4 2025 results, and the ongoing development of an AI resource marketplace with sub-agents and skills. Decisions were made regarding the presentation strategy and the involvement of specific team members in its preparation.

decisions.description: Reschedule the meeting to later in the week due to Vinnie's absence if no one has any immediate critical topics.
Shawna Behen will prepare a presentation deck for a call with Lithia's Mara, detailing Q1 2026 and Q4 2025 results.
The presentation must address past inconsistencies when onboarding Lithia dealers.
Shawna Behen and Jason Branham will lead the effort to prepare the "best overview" presentation for Lithia.
Michael Donovan and Sergey Lyapustin will continue developing the AI resource marketplace.

actionItems.task: Send Vinnie an email to inform him about the potential reschedule to tomorrow or Wednesday.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie is informed about rescheduling options.

actionItems.task: Send an email to Jason Branham and Joe Furnari with the list of Lithia dealers and a snapshot of Edwin's previous work.

expectedOutcome.description: Jason and Joe receive necessary information to prepare for the Lithia presentation.

actionItems.task: Work on a presentation deck for Mara (Lithia) covering Q1 2026 and Q4 2025 dealer performance.

expectedOutcome.description: Completed presentation deck ready for the call with Lithia.

actionItems.task: Get the framework together for the presentation overview for the conversation with Lithia.

expectedOutcome.description: A structured presentation framework for the Lithia conversation.

actionItems.task: Continue putting together AI resources and compiling a marketplace with sub agents/skills and plugins.

expectedOutcome.description: AI resource marketplace with sub-agents, skills, and plugins is developed and functional.

actionItems.task: Continue putting together AI resources and compiling a marketplace with sub agents/skills and plugins.

expectedOutcome.description: AI resource marketplace with sub-agents, skills, and plugins is developed and functional.

tensions: Concern about inconsistencies in past Lithia dealer onboarding processes.
Ensuring the Lithia presentation focuses on clear data and results rather than just visuals.
referencesToPast: Past inconsistencies when onboarding Lithia dealers, such as cancellations after a month and individual dealer deviations.
Edwin's previous work on case studies detailing performance prior to and with Strolid.
